_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of metadata standards, business glossary conventions, and data catalog tooling used to document and publish data asset definitions.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-K-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-002 (AB, cosine: 0.414), DG-A-005 (DG, cosine: 0.410).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.1/10 (raw 0.308). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [creative, formats, present] vs WIDAI-only terms [asset, business, catalog, conventions, definitions, document] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.848 (P=0.865, R=0.833). P exceeds R by 0.032 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (95.0%). "Present data in creative formats." and "Knowledge of metadata standards, business glossary conventions, and data catalog" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.416 > STS 0.308 (gap +0.107). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.8%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [creative, formats, present]. WIDAI-only: [asset, business, catalog, conventions, definitions, document].
